vs Zep"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"An honest, technical comparison for users who need memory systems for AI agents and are evaluating Zep's Graphiti temporal knowledge graph against Mnemosyne's local-first approach."}],"\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a","\n","$L2b","\n","$L2c","\n","$L2d","\n","$L2e","\n","$L2f","\n","$L30","\n","$L31","\n","$L32","\n","$L33","\n","$L34","\n","$L35","\n","$L36","\n","$L37","\n","$L38","\n","$L39","\n","$L3a","\n","$L3b","\n","$L3c","\n","$L3d","\n","$L3e","\n","$L3f","\n","$L40","\n","$L41","\n","$L42","\n","$L43","\n","$L44","\n","$L45","\n","$L46","\n","$L47"],["$L48"],"$L49"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@4a"]},null,false,"$@4a"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L4b",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$4c",["$L4d"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"CZFW9KHe2G8DAgL-QbUgc"}
4e:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"OutletBoundary"]
4f:"$Sreact.suspense"
52:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"ViewportBoundary"]
54:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Last updated:"}]," 2026-05-13 · Mnemosyne v3.0.0"]}]
8:["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"TL;DR:"}]," These are fundamentally different deployment philosophies. Zep is a ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"cloud-native context engineering platform"}]," with best-in-class temporal reasoning and a sophisticated knowledge graph engine. Mnemosyne is a ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"local-first memory layer"}]," optimized for simplicity, zero-network deployments, and full user control. Zep excels at temporal fact tracking; Mnemosyne excels at being a lightweight, dependency-free memory layer you fully own."]}],"\n"]}]
9:["$","hr",null,{}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Architecture"}]
b:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Dimension"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Zep"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Process model"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"In-process Python library"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SaaS cloud platform (Graphiti engine)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"IPC overhead"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Zero (direct function calls)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"HTTPS + JSON serialization to api.getzep.com"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Database"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite (single file, WAL mode)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Proprietary temporal knowledge graph (Graphiti)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Embedding model"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"fastembed ONNX -- BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 (~67MB)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Managed by Zep (model details not disclosed)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Vector search"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec (int8/bit/float32) or numpy fallback"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Managed vector store within Graphiti"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cold start"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Instant (if models cached locally)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"API key configuration + network round-trip"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Runtime memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~10-20MB per session (SQLite + ONNX)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Zero local resources (everything remote)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Self-hosted option"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Yes (default)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No (Community Edition deprecated, SaaS only)"}]]}]]}]]}]
c:["$","hr",null,{}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Memory Model"}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Mnemosyne: BEAM (Bilevel Episodic-Associative Memory)"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Three SQLite tables:"}]
10:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Tier"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Purpose"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Behavior"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Hot, recent context"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Auto-injected into prompts. TTL-based eviction (default 24h). Max 10,000 items. FTS5 indexed."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Episodic memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Long-term consolidated storage"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Populated by ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]," consolidation. Hybrid vector + FTS5 search."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Scratchpad"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Temporary agent workspace"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Not searchable, not consolidated. Cleared explicitly. Max 1,000 items."}]]}]]}]]}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":["Additional: ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]," -- temporal knowledge graph with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_from"}],"/",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]," for point-in-time queries."]}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Core operations:"}]," ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]," -- intentionally simple."]}]
13:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Zep: Graphiti Temporal Knowledge Graph"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":"Per-user knowledge graphs built by the Graphiti framework. Three node types:"}]
15:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Node type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Purpose"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Entity Nodes"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Represent people, organizations, concepts extracted from conversations"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Entity Edges"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Relationships between entities with temporal validity"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Episodic Nodes"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Time-stamped events and facts linked to entities"}]]}]]}]]}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":["All nodes carry ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_at"}],"/",["$","code",null,{"children":"invalid_at"}]," timestamps for full temporal versioning. Facts can be superseded or expired without data loss -- the graph maintains the full edit history."]}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Core operations:"}]," Add memory via API/SDK, retrieve via hybrid semantic + temporal + graph search."]}]
18:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Operation"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne equivalent"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Gap?"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Add memory"}]," -- Structured fact extraction via LLM, entity resolution, graph insertion"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]," with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"extract=True"}]," enables LLM fact extraction. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"extract_entities=True"}]," captures entity mentions."]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Partial gap."}]," Zep's entity resolution and structured extraction are fully automatic and core to the system. Mnemosyne's are opt-in and simpler."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Recall"}]," -- Hybrid semantic + temporal + graph traversal, sub-200ms retrieval"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," -- hybrid (vector + FTS5 + importance) x recency decay. Single-pass."]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Design difference."}]," Zep has deeper temporal reasoning (valid_at/invalid_at edges). Mnemosyne is simpler by choice."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporal query"}]," -- Point-in-time queries, fact versioning, \"what did we know and when\""]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["TripleStore ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_from"}],"/",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]," supports temporal queries but without Zep's automatic fact evolution tracking"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Gap."}]," Zep's Graphiti engine was purpose-built for temporal reasoning and achieves 94.8% on the DMR benchmark. Mnemosyne has basic temporal support."]}]]}]]}]]}]
19:["$","hr",null,{}]
1a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Retrieval"}]
1b:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Feature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Zep"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Vector search"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec (cosine distance)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Managed vector search within Graphiti"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Keyword search"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite FTS5"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Not publicly documented"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Graph search"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TripleStore (subject-predicate-object, temporal)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Native knowledge graph traversal across Entity Nodes, Edges, Episodic Nodes"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporal search"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_weight"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_halflife"}]," params on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Full temporal versioning with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_at"}],"/",["$","code",null,{"children":"invalid_at"}]," on every node and edge. Point-in-time queries."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Scoring formula"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_weight x vec + fts_weight x fts + importance_weight x importance"}],", then x recency decay"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Hybrid semantic + temporal + graph scoring (proprietary)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Default weights"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"50% vector, 30% FTS, 20% importance"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Not publicly documented"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Configurable?"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Yes -- per-query ",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_weight"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_weight"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance_weight"}]," params"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Limited (API-level filters, not scoring weights)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Reranking"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"None (single-pass)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Not publicly documented"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retrieval latency"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~2-10ms (in-process, no network)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Sub-200ms (network round-trip to Zep cloud)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporal benchmark"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Not benchmarked"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"94.8% on DMR (Diachronic Memory Reasoning)"}]]}]]}]]}]
1c:["$","hr",null,{}]
1d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Entity Extraction"}]
1e:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Feature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Zep"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Method"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Regex patterns + pure Python Levenshtein distance"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"LLM-driven extraction with automatic entity resolution"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Patterns"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"@mentions"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"#hashtags"}],", \"quoted phrases\", capitalized sequences (2-5 words)"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Full entity recognition from conversation context"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Fuzzy matching"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Levenshtein distance with prefix/substring bonuses"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Automatic entity resolution and normalization"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Storage"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["TripleStore triples: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"(memory_id, \"mentions\", \"entity_name\")"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Entity Nodes in per-user knowledge graph"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Speed"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~0.01ms per extraction"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Network-dependent (remote LLM call)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Opt-in?"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"extract_entities=True"}]," on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Automatic (core part of ingestion pipeline)"}]]}]]}]]}]
1f:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Verdict:"}]," Mnemosyne's regex approach is fast, local, and dependency-free but misses nuanced entity relationships. Zep's automatic entity resolution is more powerful but requires network calls and is not transparent. This is a deliberate trade-off: speed and local control versus NLP sophistication."]}]
20:["$","hr",null,{}]
21:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Integrations"}]
22:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"MCP (Model Context Protocol)"}]
23:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Zep"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Tools"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"6 tools"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"13 tools"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Transports"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"stdio + SSE"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"stdio + SSE"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"SDKs"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Python (core library)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Python, TypeScript, Go"}]]}]]}]]}]
24:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne MCP tools (6):"}]}]
25:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Tool"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_remember"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Store a memory (supports entity extraction, fact extraction, bank selection)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_recall"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Search memories with hybrid scoring and configurable weights"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_sleep"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Run consolidation cycle"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_scratchpad_read"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Read agent scratchpad"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_scratchpad_write"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Write to scratchpad"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_get_stats"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Get memory statistics"}]]}]]}]]}]
26:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne mcp                          # stdio transport (Claude Desktop, etc.)\nmnemosyne mcp --transport sse --port 8080  # SSE transport (web clients)\nmnemosyne mcp --bank project_a            # scoped to a specific bank\n"}]}]
27:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Zep MCP tools (13):"}]," Includes user/session management, fact retrieval, graph traversal, temporal queries, and more -- reflecting its broader surface area as a cloud platform."]}]
28:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Hermes Agent Integration"}]
29:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Zep"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hermes"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Native (in-process, no serialization). 15 tools + 3 hooks via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"plugin.yaml"}],"."]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"MCP client only (network round-trip per call)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hooks"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"pre_llm_call"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"on_session_start"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"post_tool_call"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"None (stateless API)"}]]}]]}]]}]
2a:["$","hr",null,{}]
2b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Deployment & Ownership"}]
2c:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Feature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Zep"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Self-hosted"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Yes (",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne"}],")"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No (Community Edition killed; SaaS only)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Offline capable"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Yes (zero network dependency)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No (requires internet access to api.getzep.com)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Data locality"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"All data on your disk (SQLite files)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"All data in Zep's cloud (US-hosted)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Privacy"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Full -- data never leaves your machine"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Data processed and stored by third party"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Vendor lock-in"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"None -- open source, standard SQLite format"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"High -- proprietary Graphiti engine, no export path documented"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cost"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Free (MIT licensed)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Free tier (1K credits), Flex $125/mo, Flex Plus $375/mo, Enterprise custom"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Credit system"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"N/A"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Credit-based pricing -- different operations consume different credit amounts"}]]}]]}]]}]
2d:["$","hr",null,{}]
2e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Pricing (Zep)"}]
2f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Zep uses a credit-based pricing model. Different operations (add memory, search, graph traversal) consume different numbers of credits."}]
30:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Tier"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Price"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Credits"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Best for"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Free"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"$$0"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"1,000"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Evaluation and prototyping"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Flex"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"$$125/mo"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~25,000"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Individual developers, small projects"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Flex Plus"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"$$375/mo"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~100,000"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Small teams, production agents"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Enterprise"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Custom"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Custom"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Scale deployments, SLAs, dedicated support"}]]}]]}]]}]
31:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne is free (MIT license) with no usage caps, no credit systems, and no recurring costs. You only pay for the compute you run it on."}]
32:["$","hr",null,{}]
33:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Additional Features"}]
34:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Mnemosyne-specific (not in Zep)"}]
35:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Feature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Module"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Streaming"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"core/streaming.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryStream"}]," with push (callbacks) and pull (iterator) patterns. Thread-safe event buffer."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Delta sync"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"core/streaming.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"DeltaSync"}]," -- incremental synchronization between Mnemosyne instances with checkpointed resume."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Pattern detection"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"core/patterns.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"PatternDetector"}]," -- temporal (hour/weekday), content (keyword frequency, co-occurrence), sequence patterns."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Memory compression"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"core/patterns.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryCompressor"}]," -- dictionary-based, RLE, and semantic compression strategies."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Plugin system"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"core/plugins.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"MnemosynePlugin"}]," base class with 4 lifecycle hooks. Discovers plugins from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/plugins/"}],"."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Diagnostics"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"diagnose.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"PII-safe health check -- dependencies, database state, vector readiness. No memory content or API keys."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Memory banks"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"BankManager"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Named, isolated memory banks with per-bank SQLite files. No credit limits, no per-bank pricing."}]]}]]}]]}]
36:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Zep-specific (not in Mnemosyne)"}]
37:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Feature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Best-in-class temporal reasoning"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["94.8% on DMR benchmark. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_at"}],"/",["$","code",null,{"children":"invalid_at"}]," timestamps on every node and edge. Full fact versioning."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Per-user knowledge graphs"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Automatic entity resolution, relationship extraction, and graph building per user/session."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Context engineering"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Zep positions itself as a \"context engineering\" platform -- managing what context AI agents need, when they need it."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Managed infrastructure"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Zero ops burden. No database to manage, no models to download, no updates to apply."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Multi-language SDKs"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Official Python, TypeScript, and Go SDKs with idiomatic APIs."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Automatic entity resolution"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Entities are automatically normalized and deduplicated across conversations."}]]}]]}]]}]
38:["$","hr",null,{}]
39:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Performance Characteristics"}]
3a:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Metric"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Zep"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Recall latency (10K corpus)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~2-10ms -- in-process SQLite + sqlite-vec, no HTTP overhead"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Sub-200ms -- HTTPS round-trip to Zep cloud + Graphiti traversal"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"IPC model"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Direct Python function call"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"HTTPS POST to api.getzep.com -> JSON serialization -> response parsing"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Storage footprint"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~50-100MB SQLite file per 10K memories"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Zero local storage (all remote)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Model download"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"One-time ~67MB (fastembed ONNX)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"None (models managed by Zep)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Runtime memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~10-20MB per session"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Minimal (thin API client)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Network dependency"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"None"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Full -- every operation requires internet access"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporal query perf"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~1-5ms (SQLite index scan)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Sub-200ms (Graphiti temporal traversal)"}]]}]]}]]}]
3b:["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Important caveat on latency numbers:"}]," Mnemosyne's raw latency advantage comes from being an in-process library with no network calls. But Zep's sub-200ms retrieval includes sophisticated temporal graph traversal that Mnemosyne does not attempt. Latency is not quality -- these systems are doing different work per query."]}],"\n"]}]
3c:["$","hr",null,{}]
3d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"When to Choose What"}]
3e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Choose Mnemosyne if:"}]
3f:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["You need ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install"}]," with zero cloud dependencies or API keys"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You need the fastest possible recall latency for interactive agent loops"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You require full data privacy -- memory content must never leave your machine"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You're running on resource-constrained or air-gapped environments"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You're building a single-user, single-machine agent (Hermes, Claude Desktop, etc.)"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You want an MCP-compatible memory layer (stdio + SSE) with no usage caps"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You want memory banks with per-project isolation without per-bank pricing"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You want full control over the memory model and data format"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You need offline capability -- your agent works without internet"}],"\n"]}]
40:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Choose Zep if:"}]
41:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You need best-in-class temporal reasoning (94.8% DMR, fact versioning, point-in-time queries)"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You need automatic entity resolution and relationship extraction at scale"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You need per-user knowledge graphs for multi-user applications"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You want zero ops burden -- no databases, no model downloads, no updates"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You're building a production SaaS that needs managed memory infrastructure"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You need multi-language SDK support (Python, TypeScript, Go) with first-class treatment"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You're okay with credit-based pricing and can budget for recurring costs"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You don't need self-hosted or offline capability"}],"\n"]}]
42:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Neither is \"better.\" They optimize for fundamentally different constraints: ownership and simplicity versus managed sophistication and temporal reasoning depth."}]
43:["$","hr",null,{}]
44:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Known Gaps in Mnemosyne (honest list)"}]
45:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Gap"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Severity"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Workaround"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No automatic entity normalization"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Medium"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"extract_entities=True"}]," captures entities; fuzzy matching helps but doesn't resolve coreference"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No per-user knowledge graphs"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Medium for multi-user apps"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Per-bank SQLite isolation provides domain separation, not per-user isolation"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Temporal reasoning is basic (TripleStore)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Medium for temporal-heavy use cases"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_weight"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_halflife"}]," on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," covers recency, not versioned fact evolution"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No managed cloud option"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Low for self-hosted users"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Export/import JSON for migration; backup SQLite files directly"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No TypeScript or Go SDK"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Medium for non-Python environments"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"MCP protocol is language-agnostic; use MCP client in any language"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No automatic fact versioning/deprecation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Medium"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Manual ",["$","code",null,{"children":"invalidate(memory_id, replacement_id=new_id)"}]]}]]}]]}]]}]
46:["$","hr",null,{}]
47:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","em",null,{"children":"This page compares Mnemosyne v3.0.0 against Zep's current cloud offering as of May 2026. Zep's Community Edition was deprecated and is no longer available for self-hosting. Every Mnemosyne feature listed has been verified against the source code. If anything here is wrong, please open an issue -- we'll fix it."}]}]

57:I[72,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"IconMark"]
50:null
55:[["$","title","0",{"children":"Mnemosyne vs Zep -- Honest Technical Comparison"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"description","content":"Apples-to-apples comparison of Mnemosyne self-hosted and Zep cloud for local Hermes Agent deployments.
